---
title: "R Fundamentals Notes"
output: html_document
---


# R FUNDAMENTALS

## Basic Data Types.

1. numeric
2. integer (1L, where the letter 'L' declares it an integer)
3. complex (9+3i, where 'i' is the imaginary part)
4. character (string)
5. logical (boolean) - (TRUE or FALSE)

-The class() function is used to check the data type of a variable

    x <- 10.5
    class(x)
    <!-- prints numeric -->


## Type Conversion.

-Convert from one type to another using:

    as.numeric()
    as.integer()
    as.complex()


## R Math

### Built-in Math Functions

    min(5, 10, 15)
    max(10, 29, 87)

    sqrt(16)
    <!-- finds the square root -->

    abs(-4.7)

    ceiling(1.4)
    floor(1.4)
